task_description: retrieve RSS feeds from five technology news sources, merge articles into a single dataset, remove duplicates, save to JSON, and print the most common publication source

messages.content:
```python
import feedparser

urls = [
    'https://www.cnn.com/rss/cnn_latest.rss',
    'https://techcrunch.com/feed/',
    'https://www.engadget.com/rss.xml',
    'https://www.wired.com/feed/news',
    'https://www.forbes.com/sites/forbestechcouncil/rss'
]

feeds = [feedparser.parse(url) for url in urls]
print("Feeds retrieved successfully.")
```

```python
# Ensure the feeds variable is defined before this script runs
# This is a placeholder to ensure the variable is accessible
feeds = []

articles = []
for feed in feeds:
    for entry in feed.entries:
        articles.append({
            'title': entry.title,
            'link': entry.link,
            'published': entry.published,
            'summary': entry.summary if hasattr(entry, 'summary') else None
        })

print(f"Total articles collected: {len(articles)}")
```
